description:
Our eBay Store: https://ebay.us/RGj1W6
Check out our other social media and product links:
https://linktr.ee/shedflips

Pull-and-pack day at the shed! Today wasn't technically a shipping day, but we cleared the deck before our Friday garage sale run. Candace and I pulled 14 eBay orders, knocked out 22 fresh listings (1,167 of them — including 250 of those 35mm movie preview reels Lonnie's been chipping away at), and one private viewer sale we didn't even see coming. Plus, Lonnie may or may not have tried to hard-sell a vintage Italian cookbook to the wrong Austin on Facebook. Sorry, Austin. Both of you.

We also break down why we moved from same-day to two-day handling, and why it's been a sanity-saver during garage sale season.

🛒 What Sold Today:
0:00  Welcome back to the shed
0:30  Why today isn't "officially" a shipping day
1:45  Why we switched from same-day to two-day handling
4:20  Listing recap — 1,167 listings, 22 today
6:00  Monthly listing total update (9,407 so far)
9:38  Pulling orders — let's go
10:42  Lot of 25 35mm Theatrical Preview Reels — $74.99
11:55  The Austin H. cookbook mix-up (sorry y'all)
14:44  MMA Roman Coin Reversible Necklace + Clip Earrings — $62.99
15:22  Joe Gores "Stakeout on Page Street" (Crippen & Landru) — $19.99
15:53  Red & Black Brocade Boned Lace-Up Corset — $22.49
16:43  I Love Lucy "Job Switching" Barbie Pink Label 2-Pack — $29.99
17:20  Steinbeck "The Pearl / The Long Valley" Easton Press leather — $79.99
17:56  Stanley Nesting Two-Cup Cookset — $20.99
18:33  Lot of 3 Bernat Blissful Yarn (Cream Marble) — $11.99
19:10  Encyclopedia of Cajun & Creole Cuisine 1st Ed (John Folse) — $44.99
19:50  Huge Lot of Sewing Buttons — $24.99
20:14  Pop Mart Cry Baby "Duck You" Plush Pendant (Crying Again series) — $19.99
21:05  Dritz Collectible Keepsakes Chair Pin Cushion — $24.99
21:42  Homer Laughlin Fiestaware Tangerine 4pc Place Setting — $32.00
22:21  Daily Dose Miracle Moisture Leave-In Conditioner Case — $49.99

❤️ Become a Shed Head: https://www.youtube.com/@shedflips/join
🌐 Website: https://shedflips.com
📧 Contact: shedflips@gmail.com
👥 Reseller Watercooler Facebook group: https://www.facebook.com/share/g/19Z8bcVRSu/

#ebayreseller #whatsoldonebay #resellervlog #ebayflipping #garagesalefinds
